One-liner Explanation: Covers medical expenses for hospitalisation exceeding 24 hours.
Covers listed procedures that do not require 24-hour hospitalisation.
Covers medical expenses incurred before and after hospitalisation for a defined period.
Covers hospital room charges up to the eligible category or limits.
Covers treatment expenses incurred in the Intensive Care Unit.
Covers emergency road ambulance transportation expenses.
Covers treatment taken at home when hospitalisation is medically not possible.
Increases the sum insured for every claim-free policy year.
Reinstates exhausted sum insured after it is used in a claim.
Covers hospitalisation expenses of the organ donor when the insured is the recipient.
Covers treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani, Siddha, and Homeopathy systems.
Coverage starts after the standard 30-day waiting period.
Covers pre-existing diseases after a specified waiting period.
Covers certain listed illnesses after a defined waiting period.
Allows cancellation of policy within the free-look period after purchase.
Allows transfer of policy to another insurer with continuity benefits.
Allows switching to another plan within the same insurer.
Claims cannot be denied after 8 continuous policy years except in case of fraud.
